items.title: Lead Full Stack AI Engineer
items.description: Architected and deployed an AI Voice Assistant for clinical research, automating patient screening and scheduling, reducing manual effort by 30%. Built real-time AI Agents with Vapi, FastAPI, Azure, Gemini, and OpenAI. Reduced recruiter workload by 40% and achieved 99.9% system reliability.

items.title: LLM Prompt Engineer
items.description: Developed, tested, and refined prompts for Large Language Models, optimizing AI output for specific use cases. Reduced bias by 20%, reduced ambiguity by 15%, and improved user satisfaction through rigorous iterative testing.

items.title: Senior Software Engineer
items.description: Led full-stack development of a SaaS multi-tenant e-commerce platform. Automated product migration with FastAPI, cutting migration time by 50%. Built real-time product monitoring with Python Scrapy/Selenium and orchestrated Firebase for auth and analytics.

items.title: Full Stack Engineer
items.description: Automated data extraction from invoices and delivery notes using Angular Material and Java Spring Boot, increasing processing efficiency by 35%. Deployed and managed applications on AWS EC2, S3, and Lambda.

items.title: Team Lead
items.description: Led a cross-functional team of 8+, achieving 95% client satisfaction. Engineered a Resume & Job Scoring/Matching Engine using Django REST Framework, and developed a Retail Management System with offline data syncing using Angular and PostgreSQL.

items.title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
items.organization: PAF Karachi Institute of Economics & Technology
items.description: Graduated with a BS in Computer Science. Gained strong foundations in software engineering, algorithms, data structures, databases, and computer networks.

items.title: AI Workflow Automation & LLM Engineering
items.description: Specialized training in LLM prompt engineering, AI agent architecture, and fine-tuning generative AI responses for real-world production use cases across diverse domains.

items.title: Cloud & DevOps Practices
items.description: Hands-on expertise with AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), Azure (Key Vault, App Insights, Storage Blob), Docker, NGINX, CI/CD pipelines, and Agile/Scrum methodologies.
